overlay.hintHold: Release {key} to finish · tap to lock · Esc cancels
overlay.hintToggle: Press {key} again to finish · Esc cancels
overlay.hintLocked: Locked — press {key} to finish · Esc cancels
overlay.engineError: Engine is not ready — open WhisperPress to check
overlay.noModel: No model installed — finish setup first
footer.hint: Hold {key} in any app to dictate
notes.placeholder1: Hold {key} in any app and speak
notes.placeholder2: Your words are typed where your cursor is, and saved here.
import.title: Import audio files
import.desc: Transcribe MP3, M4A, WAV, OGG, FLAC and more — entirely on your device.
import.decodeError: Could not decode this audio file
meeting.title: Meeting recording
meeting.desc: Record system audio (Teams, Meet, Zoom…) plus your microphone, then transcribe locally.
meeting.tip: Pick any screen when prompted — only audio is recorded, the screen image is discarded.
settings.title: Settings
settings.modeToggle: Press to start / press to stop
settings.restoreClipboardTip:
Paste mode briefly replaces your clipboard with the transcript. When enabled, your previous clipboard content is put back ~0.35 s after pasting, so nothing you copied gets lost.
Limitation: only text is restored — images and files are not.
When disabled, the transcript stays on the clipboard for pasting elsewhere.
settings.saveAudioTip:
When enabled, the recording of each dictation is attached to its note so you can replay it later.
Uses disk space (~2 MB per minute). When disabled, only the text is kept.
settings.promptTip:
Fake context fed to Whisper before decoding — output tends to continue its wording and style:
• Proper nouns — list names, companies and jargon you say often; similar-sounding speech resolves to them
• Style — include a sample sentence in your preferred style
• A punctuated prompt also encourages punctuated output
Note: this is a probabilistic bias, not a guarantee; for Traditional/Simplified use the Chinese output script setting above.
settings.promptPh: e.g. Names: WhisperPress, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, commit
settings.storageMoveError: Could not move the storage folder
settings.aiTip:
Adds AI summaries and ask-the-transcript Q&A. Requires an OpenAI-compatible endpoint:
• To stay fully offline: install Ollama (ollama.com) and keep the default Base URL
• Or point it at a cloud service (e.g. OpenAI) with its API key
Note content is only sent to the endpoint you configure. Off by default; dictation is unaffected.
settings.aiDesc: Summaries, titles and Q&A use any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Point it at Ollama or LM Studio on this PC to stay fully offline.
settings.closeToTray: Keep running in tray when closed
settings.threadsTip:
Number of CPU threads the whisper engine uses. 0 = automatic (half your cores, max 8).
More threads transcribe faster but load the machine more.
With CUDA (GPU) the heavy lifting happens on the graphics card, so this matters little.
ob.welcomeDesc: Hold a key, speak, and your words appear wherever your cursor is. 100% offline — audio never leaves this PC.
ob.setupDesc: WhisperPress downloads whisper.cpp and a model once. Everything runs locally afterwards.
ob.readyDesc: Hold {key} and speak — try it in the box below, or in any other app.
ob.tryPh: Click here, hold the hotkey and speak…
app.hotkeyUnavailable: Global hotkeys could not be initialized. Dictation via hotkey is disabled — you can still use Import and Meeting.
